summary: Saved Crews API & Live Map Status Testing Complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. All Saved Crews CRUD endpoints working correctly. Frontend: Component imports verified - SavedCrewSelector, BookingProgressBar, and map-status.css all properly integrated.
critical_code_review_comments: SavedCrewSelector imported in Bookings.js line 22, used in OnDemandRequestDrawer line 332
BookingProgressBar imported in Bookings.js line 21, shows 3-step flow (Details -> Crew Hub -> Confirm) on lines 183, 419, 454
map-status.css imported in index.css line 2 with breathing animations for Red (shooting-live), Green (on-demand), Purple (both)
MapPage.js uses status CSS classes on lines 961-973 for photographer pin status indicators
seed_data_creation: Test crews created with TEST_ prefix are cleaned up after each test class
context_for_next_testing_agent: Saved Crews API fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/crews/saved (returns crews array), POST /api/crews/saved (creates crew), GET /api/crews/saved/default (returns default crew), POST /api/crews/saved/{id}/set-default (sets default), DELETE /api/crews/saved/{id} (deletes crew), POST /api/crews/saved/{id}/use (increments usage counter). Frontend components SavedCrewSelector and BookingProgressBar are integrated in Bookings.js On-Demand flow. Map status CSS breathing animations are in map-status.css and used in MapPage.js.

GET_saved_crews.details: Returns crews array with id, name, is_default, members, member_count, times_used, last_used_at, created_at

GET_saved_crews_empty_for_new_user.details: Returns empty array for users with no saved crews

POST_create_saved_crew.details: Creates crew with name, members array, is_default flag

POST_create_saved_crew_as_default.details: Sets is_default=true and unsets other defaults

GET_default_crew.details: Returns default_crew object or null if none set

POST_set_default_crew.details: Sets crew as default, returns success and default_crew_id

DELETE_saved_crew.details: Deletes crew and verifies removal from list

booking_progress_bar_import.details: BookingProgressBar imported in Bookings.js line 21, shows 3-step flow

mocked_apis.note: All Saved Crews endpoints use real database operations
